home.label: Welcome
home.title: Welcome back, {name}
home.descriptionCustomer: Your banking overview is ready. Review your accounts or start a transfer when you need to move money.
home.descriptionEmployee: Your employee workspace is ready. Manage customers, review approvals, and inspect customer accounts from one place.
home.descriptionPending: Your account has been created. A bank employee still needs to approve your profile before banking features open.
home.summaryDescriptionCustomer: Your customer profile is active and ready for everyday banking.
home.summaryDescriptionEmployee: Your employee profile gives you access to customer and account management.
home.summaryDescriptionPending: Your customer profile is waiting for review. You can return here while approval is pending.
home.nextDescriptionCustomer: View your balances, check your account details, or prepare your next transfer.
home.nextDescriptionEmployee: Open the customer overview, approve new customers, or review all customer accounts.
home.nextDescriptionPending: You do not need to do anything else right now. Once approved, your accounts and transfers will become available.

accounts.label: Accounts
accounts.title: Accounts overview
accounts.description: Your checking and savings balances, IBANs, and transfer limits.
accounts.emptyDescription: Your accounts will appear here once an employee approves your profile.

accountsDirectory.label: Employee
accountsDirectory.title: Accounts directory
accountsDirectory.description: Every customer account at a glance. Select an account to view its full details.
accountsDirectory.emptyDescription: There are no accounts to show yet.

transfers.label: Transfers
transfers.title: Transfer funds
transfers.description: Move money between accounts with clear account selection, recipient details, and amount checks.

customers.label: Employee
customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Search registered customers and review their approval status.

pendingCustomers.label: Employee
pendingCustomers.title: Pending customer approvals
pendingCustomers.description: Registered customers without bank accounts are listed here for employee review.
pendingCustomers.emptyTitle: No customers are waiting for approval

login.label: Authentication
login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in with your Project Bank details to continue.
login.registrationSuccess: Account created. Sign in to continue.

register.label: Onboarding
register.title: Create your customer account
register.description: Create your customer profile. A bank employee will review it before your accounts become available.
